title: Berkeley Square
writer: John L. Balderston, Sonya Levien, Henry James
actors: Leslie Howard, Heather Angel, Valerie Taylor
plot: A young American man comes to believe that he can will himself back to London in the time of the American Revolution and meet his ancestors, who lived in the house he has just inherited.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 2 nominations total
